heading: “Family resource and support programs” defined
label: 12352 “Family resource and support programs” defined
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1990 Amendment note under .Oct. 1, 1990section 1001(a) of Pub. L. 101–501section 8621 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1990 Amendment note under .Oct. 1, 1990section 1001(a) of Pub. L. 101–501section 8621 of this title

children.text: the provision of assistance to build family skills and assist parents in improving their capacities to be supportive and nurturing parents;

the provision of assistance to families to enable such families to use other formal and informal resources and opportunities for assistance that are available within the communities of such families; and
the creation of supportive networks to enhance the childrearing capacity of parents and assist in compensating for the increased social isolation and vulnerability of families.
